keywords.name: My name is Captain Seahorse from the Royal Tibia Line.
keywords.job: I am the captain of this sailing-ship.

keywords.trip: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Carlin, Ab'Dendriel, Venore, Port Hope, Ankrahmun or the isle Cormaya?

keywords.darashia: I'm not sailing there. This route is afflicted by a ghost ship! However I've heard that Captain Fearless from Venore sails there.

keywords.ghost: Many people who sailed to Darashia never returned because they were attacked by a ghostship! I'll never sail there!
